name: materials-skills
description: Full-cycle materials science and engineering research skills for literature, writing, figures, data, HTML decks, citations, and reviewer responses.

interface.shortDescription: Paper-production workflows for materials science research.
interface.longDescription: Use Materials Science Skills to run routed materials paper-production workflows across research planning, citation screening, reader packages, manuscript drafting, English polishing, figure packages, FAIR data organization, reviewer simulation, reviewer responses, and HTML academic deck generation.
defaultPrompt: Help me run a WER-EA mini-review workflow from screening to figure planning.
Audit this experimental manuscript for evidence gaps before I draft the discussion.
Turn this paper package into a journal-club outline and verified HTML academic deck.
